data.title: OCBC Bank: Raises its year-end 2026 gold price target to $5,600
data.description: OCBC Bank analysts have raised their gold price forecast, now expecting gold to reach $5,600 per ounce by the end of 2026. Christopher Wong, the bank's foreign exchange strategist, said the upward revision stemmed from the strong rally in the safe-haven metal, prompting an upward revision from the previous forecast of $4,800. Wong stated that the rise in gold prices reflects recent developments and their unexpected persistence, rather than a reassessment of the underlying logic. "What has evolved is the degree of gold allocation, not the fundamental reasons for holding gold," Wong pointed out. Rising government debt, geopolitical concerns, and policy uncertainty have significantly enhanced gold's structural position in investors' asset allocation. Gold is no longer merely a crisis or inflation hedge, but is increasingly seen as a neutral and reliable store of value, providing asset diversification. (Jinshi)

data.title: Tokenized Gold and Silver Market Caps Reach New Highs
data.description: Tokenized gold and silver markets have reached new highs as precious metal prices rise. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coingecko indicates that the total market capitalization of tokenized gold has surpassed $5.25 billion, currently standing at $5,257,493,257, with a 24-hour increase of 0.8%. Meanwhile, the market capitalization of tokenized silver has exceeded $400 million, now at $434,167,100, reflecting a 24-hour growth of 3.3%.

data.title: South Korea's Virtual Asset Law Faces Delays Amid Controversy
data.description:
South Korea's progress on the second phase of its Virtual Asset Law has been delayed due to disputes over key provisions. According to PANews, the legislation aims to comprehensively regulate digital assets, including stablecoins. The main points of contention involve the eligibility of issuers for Korean won stablecoins, debating whether banks or authorized enterprises should lead, and whether to relax the separation of financial and virtual asset businesses to foster innovation. Additionally, the proposal to cap major shareholders' stakes in exchanges at 15%-20% has been criticized as overly restrictive.

The legislative delay has also stalled discussions on related topics, such as spot virtual asset ETFs and the involvement of listed companies in virtual asset trading. Negotiations continue among government agencies, industry participants, and political groups.

data.title: Binance Futures to Update XAUUSDT Perpetual Contract Price Index
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will implement changes to the price index components of the USDⓈ-Margined XAUUSDT Perpetual Contract. This update is scheduled to take effect on 2026-01-29 at 08:00 (UTC). The adjustments aim to optimize the trading experience for users by refining the composition of the price index.

The revised price index will see changes in the weightage of its components. The PAXGUSDT component from Binance will maintain its weightage at 1%. However, significant adjustments will be made to the other components. The Dxfeed XAU/USD:AFX component will see an increase in its weightage from 9% to 33%. Similarly, the weightage for both MassiveC.XAU/USD and PythXAU will be adjusted from 45% to 33% each. These changes reflect Binance's ongoing efforts to enhance the accuracy and reliability of its price indices.

This update is released under Binance Exchange Rule 17, and users are encouraged to visit the Price Index page for the latest information on price index components. API users can access the updated data through the endpoint: /fapi/v1/constituents. The adjustments are part of Binance's commitment to providing a robust trading environment, ensuring that users have access to precise and up-to-date market data. The announcement underscores Binance's dedication to continuously reviewing and improving its product offerings to meet the needs of its global user base.

data.title: Key Considerations for Using Clawdbot in the Crypto Industry
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) about important precautions for using Clawdbot in the crypto industry. The post highlighted eight critical points to ensure safe usage. Firstly, it advised against exposing the Gateway to the public internet, emphasizing the need to restrict access sources to avoid direct IP exposure. Secondly, it stressed that private keys or mnemonic phrases should never interact with the Agent, even for 'read-only tasks.' Additionally, the post recommended applying the principle of least privilege to API keys, whether for exchanges or data sources, to minimize potential risks.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Key Resistance Levels Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description: Crypto KOL 币特进 (@roger73005305) posted on X, discussing the current resistance levels for Bitcoin. According to the post, Bitcoin is encountering significant resistance at two key positions: 87,972 and 90,428. These levels are crucial barriers that Bitcoin has struggled to surpass recently. The post suggests that if Bitcoin fails to break through these resistance points, it may present opportunities for short selling, with a recommendation to include stop-loss measures. The analysis highlights the ongoing challenges in the cryptocurrency market, emphasizing the importance of strategic trading decisions in light of current market conditions.

data.title: Solana Sees Significant Stablecoin Inflow as Ethereum Supply Declines
data.description: Solana has experienced the largest stablecoin inflow over the past seven days, with an increase of $1.3 billion. According to ChainCatcher, during the same period, Ethereum's supply saw a reduction of $3.4 billion.

data.title: Consensys Urges FTC to Prioritize Neutral Security Measures in Nomad Case
data.description: Consensys, the parent company of MetaMask, has called on the U.S. Federal Trade Commission (FTC) to prioritize technology-neutral security measures in the Nomad case. According to Foresight News, Consensys expressed concerns that the proposed mandate might inadvertently hinder transparency in security practices. The FTC has requested the mandatory adoption of features like 'circuit breakers,' mechanisms designed to halt operations during suspicious activities. Consensys argues that such compulsory regulations could overlook the unique architecture of decentralized systems.

data.title: Gate Square's revamped content incentive mechanism is now in public beta, with creators eligible for up to 60% commission rebates.
data.description: According to official news, Gate Square recently completed an upgrade to its "content mining" mechanism and simultaneously launched a public beta test for its "Revitalized Season." The upgrade focuses on optimizing content incentives and transaction rebate pathways, driving the conversion of content value into actual revenue. During the public beta, creators who publish qualified content on Gate Square and guide users to complete real transactions in spot, futures, or Alpha trading can participate in fee rebate sharing, with individual creators potentially receiving up to 60% of the fees. In terms of revenue structure, all eligible creators receive a 10% basic rebate guarantee. The platform also introduces an interaction incentive mechanism, offering additional rebates upon achieving posting or interaction targets. Furthermore, Gate Square will rank creators weekly based on post count and interaction performance, providing extra rewards to the top 100 creators. Double rebates are also offered to new and returning creators during the public beta. Gate stated that it will continue to optimize content incentives and transaction conversion mechanisms to encourage more creators to cultivate a long-term presence on Gate Square, jointly building a more vibrant and sustainable content and trading ecosystem.

data.title: Da Hongfei: Plans to resolve Neo's investment in Binance and realize its value within two years.
data.description: Da Hongfei stated in an article on the X platform that Zhang Zhengwen did not disclose the discussions between the two parties regarding the Binance investment. Neo invested in Binance in 2017 and has not received any dividends or BNB distributions to date. However, this investment remains a significant financial asset for NF and NGD, belonging to the community and cannot be managed in a dictatorial manner. One of its goals is to resolve and realize the value of this investment within the next two years, using the funds for the Neo ecosystem. Da Hongfei pointed out that Zhang Zhengwen's current agenda, including smearing his character, threatening his personal safety, and attempting a hostile takeover, is pushing Neo to a dangerous extreme and jeopardizing Neo's assets themselves. Da Hongfei called on Zhang Zhengwen to stop fighting for personal control and a dictatorial agenda and to add functionality to the Neo mainnet as a core developer.

data.title: Solana saw $1.3 billion in stablecoin inflows and $3.4 billion in Ethereum outflows over the past 7 days.
data.description: Artemis data shows that Solana saw the largest inflow of stablecoins over the past 7 days, increasing by $1.3 billion, while Ethereum's supply decreased by $3.4 billion. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: ETH Predicted to Surpass BTC in Quantum Security
data.description: Framework Ventures co-founder Vance Spencer shared on the X platform that if current conditions persist, Ethereum (ETH) will emerge as the sole quantum-secure cryptocurrency. According to Odaily, Spencer anticipates that ETH could surpass Bitcoin (BTC) within one to two years.
